headline: Airbnb issued its Shareholder Letter announcing financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings is a critical catalyst that will dictate near-term stock performance. Investors will focus on the non-GAAP reconciliations, forward guidance, and management's commentary during the earnings call to update their valuation models.
key_figures: Fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025
Conference call on February 12, 2026 at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET
